message:
feat(ad): add higher-order VJP rules for triangular solve, Cholesky, and einsum

Add VJP implementations for trsm (triangular solve with multiple
right-hand sides), Cholesky factorization, and generalized einsum
with implicit output index inference. Includes:
- trsm VJP: forward-mode substitution reuse with transpose/adjoint
  symmetry handling for upper/lower/unit-diagonal variants
- Cholesky VJP: symmetric gradient projection via the Barthels-Schmelzer
  copyleft formula (lower-triangular Phi operator)
- Einsum VJP: contraction-index recovery through set arithmetic on
  input/output subscript characters, with per-operand adjoint einsum
  expression construction
- Helper: add solve_triangular primitive to the session API

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
